name: Genoise- Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the butter over low heat and set it aside to cool slightly.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the eggs and sugar. Place the mixture in a double boiler, stirring constantly by hand until the sugar has dissolved and the mixture is lukewarm.
4. Beat the egg and sugar mixture for about 5 minutes using an electric mixer on high speed until it triples in volume and is pale ivory in color.
5. Sift the flour twice. Gradually sift the flour over the egg and sugar mixture, folding gently to combine.
6. Add the cooled butter and fold gently but quickly into the batter.
7. Butter and flour the sides and bottoms of two 9-inch springform pans.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pans.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for about 20 minutes.
10. Remove the cakes from the pans and cool on wire racks.
Preparation time: 1 1/2 hours
